# ============================================================================
# Portable environment for the egyptian_hiero project.
# Edit this file to ADD packages, then re-run:  bash env/bootstrap.sh
# (Installed into the project-local .venv on persistent NFS storage, so it
#  survives JupyterHub overlay/container resets.)
# ============================================================================

# --- core deps for scripts/ (used by pipelines/generation procedural engine) ---
numpy                     # all scripts
scipy                     # handwriting_augment
scikit-image              # skeletonize (handwriting_augment, skeleton_simplify)
pillow                    # skeleton_simplify
opencv-python-headless    # cv2 (headless: no libGL needed on this server)

# --- utilities (notebooks / visual inspection) ---
matplotlib                # visual inspection of glyphs/variants
tqdm
ipykernel                 # register this env as a Jupyter kernel on JupyterHub
